parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the panning. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the modulation.
parameters-en.Shape: Selects the type of LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator) waveform that controls the panning. "Triangle" and "Sine" provide smoother movement between the left and right channels whereas with "Square," the signal instantly jumps back and forth.
parameters-en.Vol Sens: Controls the peak follower's input sensitivity. Higher values cause the input signal to generate fast panning, which slows down gradually as the input signal decays.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the panning effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no panning is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
